title: Free Distribution Engine — Passive Reach Without Spam
principle: Google alone may be too slow. Build free distribution that Hermes can automate safely.

pinterest.action: Create image pins for data assets and top calculator pages
pinterest.condition: Only if account/API/workflow already exists and is safe

bing_webmaster.action: Submit sitemap to Bing Webmaster Tools
bing_webmaster.condition: If account already exists or can be set up

indexnow.condition: Only if technically supported by the platform and appropriate
indexnow.limit: Only for new quality pages (not mass submission)

rss_feed.action: Maintain RSS feed with new pages and data assets
rss_feed.condition: Already exists or easy to build

newsletter_archive.action: Build public archive page of data publications
newsletter_archive.condition: No email sending — just a public page

public_dataset_pages.limit: Each data asset gets a page

github_csv_repo.action: Publish CSVs as public GitHub repo
github_csv_repo.condition: Only if safe and already available
github_csv_repo.limit: One repo, updated with each data asset

sitemap_freshness.action: Keep sitemap updated, lastmod dates current

internal_hub_links.action: Link new pages from hub pages (/calculators, /blog, /data)

ai_answer_formatting.action: Structure pages for AI snippet extraction

for_each_new_content: Create share image if useful (for data assets)
Create optional Pinterest pin if safe
Create dataset reference if it's a data asset
